report_name: AI-Enabled Cybercrime Fuels 389% Surge in Ransomware Victims, Fortinet Reports

threat_actors.name: AI-Enabled Cybercriminals
threat_actors.description: A general classification for cybercriminals who leverage AI tools like WormGPT and FraudGPT to industrialize and accelerate their attacks, as described in the Fortinet 2026 Global Threat Landscape Report. This trend includes using AI for creating polymorphic malware, developing exploits faster, and conducting large-scale, effective phishing campaigns.
threat_actors.goals: Financial gain through ransomware, comprehensive data theft for digital identity and business process compromise.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: Used as the primary impact of ransomware attacks, which saw a 389% year-over-year increase in confirmed victims due to the industrialization of cybercrime.

attack_patterns.name: Spearphishing via Social Engineering LLM
attack_patterns.description: Generative AI tools like WormGPT and FraudGPT are used to create highly convincing, personalized phishing emails and social media lures at scale, significantly increasing the success rate of initial access attempts.

attack_patterns.name: Develop Capabilities
attack_patterns.description: AI is used to dramatically shorten the time between a vulnerability's disclosure and its weaponization by analyzing patches, reverse-engineering vulnerabilities, and generating exploit code at machine speed.

attack_patterns.name: Active Scanning
attack_patterns.description: AI agents are used to continuously scan the internet for vulnerable systems and identify high-value targets.

attack_patterns.name: Polymorphic Code
attack_patterns.description: AI is used to automatically generate polymorphic malware that evades signature-based detection.

malware.name: WormGPT
malware.description: An AI-powered crime-as-a-service tool available on the dark web, used to generate highly convincing phishing emails and other malicious content, lowering the barrier to entry for sophisticated attacks.

malware.name: FraudGPT
malware.description: An AI-powered crime-as-a-service tool available on the dark web, used to generate highly convincing phishing emails and other malicious content, contributing to the surge in ransomware and social engineering attacks.

identities.name: Manufacturing Sector
identities.description: Identified as one of the most targeted sectors for industrialized ransomware attacks.

identities.name: Business Services Sector
identities.description: Identified as one of the most targeted sectors for industrialized ransomware attacks.

identities.name: Retail Sector
identities.description: Identified as one of the most targeted sectors for industrialized ransomware attacks.

infrastructure.name: Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) Platform
infrastructure.description: Industrialized Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) models, augmented with AI for target selection and communication, are a key driver of the 389% increase in ransomware victims.
